ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score of the game (e.g., 100-95) */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  "team_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "player_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" TEXT /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "can_view_game_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to view game statistics */,
  "can_view_player_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to view player statistics */,
  "can_edit_game_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to edit game statistics */,
  "can_edit_player_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to edit player statistics */,
  "can_generate_reports" INTEGER /* Permission to generate reports */,
  "can_view_team_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to view team statistics */,
  "can_edit_team_stats" INTEGER /* Permission to edit team statistics */,
  "can_view_player_profiles" INTEGER /* Permission to view player profiles */,
  "can_edit_player_profiles" INTEGER /* Permission to edit player profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
column_names: Venue where the game was played
Indicates if the game went into overtime
Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed)
City where the team is based
ID of the team the player belongs to
Position of the player (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C)
Height of the player in inches
Weight of the player in pounds
Unique identifier for each user role
